title: 8 Things Humility Actually Does in a Man
caption:
Most men have humility confused with weakness. They're not the same thing.

Weakness shrinks from the fight. Humility knows it doesn't have to win every one. Weakness has no backbone. Humility has a spine — and still gets on its knees.

Here's what humility actually produces in a man: teachability, trust, honest prayer, protection from the success that corrupts, and at the end of it — more of Jesus and less of the version of you that was running on pride.

"Learn from me, for I am gentle and humble in heart, and you will find rest for your souls." — Matthew 11:29

Save this for the man still confusing humility with having no fight in him.

#faith #christianmen #humility #scripture #manofgod #godlymen #christianity #walkingwithgod
